steps.clue: Complete Simon Says on the four computers outside the Receiving Bay
Within 60 seconds, hack the four glowing green terminals.
Shoot it with the Wave Gun when it reaches the satellite dish.
Grenade the shelf beside the teleporter and throw a Gersh Device at the fallen plates.
Throw a QED at the plates near Quick Revive.
Insert the charged Vril Device into the pyramid.
Throw a QED at the Vril Sphere.
